jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Laurus Labs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
